title: Manage sensor resources properly
description: Proper management of sensor resources is essential to prevent leaks and ensure efficient operation, especially in mobile and embedded applications. Failing to release sensors can lead to battery drain and degraded performance. Always release sensor resources when they are no longer needed.
recommendation: Release sensor resources promptly after use to avoid leaks and performance issues.

checks.message: Ensure sensors are properly unregistered when not in use to save battery.
